arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: Two changes in our expected team v Wycombe Wanderers!
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic squad and predicts the 11 men who Shaun Maloney will select to start against Wycombe Wanderers at Adams Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Why Wigan Athletic's forwards need to step up to help loan
arts.sum: Owen Dale insists Wigan Athletic's forward players need to step up to the plate and ease the burden on centre-forward Dale Taylor.

arts.ttl: PART ONE: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'I don't think our current style of play suits these players...'
arts.sum: In the first of a two-part 12th Man, our panel of Latics run the rule over a disappointing return of one point from Stockport and Crawley ahead of a tough trip to second-placed Wycombe this weekend...with injuries continuing to bite...

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'We have gotten many key decisions wrong off the pitch...'
arts.sum: In the second of a two-part 12th Man, our panel of Latics run the rule over a disappointing return of one point from Stockport and Crawley ahead of a tough trip to second-placed Wycombe this weekend...with injuries continuing to bite...

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic to make checks on pair ahead of Wycombe Wanderers trip
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic will assess Jensen Weir and James Carragher ahead of the weekend, as per a report by… The post Wigan Athletic to make checks on pair ahead of Wycombe Wanderers trip appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss outlines first-team plan for Josh Robinson
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has lifted the lid on why Josh Robinson has yet to make his mark at Wigan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Team news: Wigan Athletic boss provides duo update ahead of Wycombe Wanderers trip
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic boss Shaun Maloney will give Jensen Weir and James Carragher until the last possible moment to prove their fitness ahead of this weekend's tough trip to high-flying Wycombe Wanderers.
